mission.title: keda: Metrics API Scaler support different format
mission.description: Metrics API Scaler support different format. Requested by 9+ users.

steps.title: Check current keda deployment
steps.description:
Verify your keda version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
helm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working keda installation.

steps.title: Review keda configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant keda configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda
```
### Proposal

Extend metrics API scaler to support Prometheus format, **or new scaler would be preferable?**

I'm thinking something like

```yaml
triggers:
- type: metrics-api
  metadata:
    targetValue: "8"
    url:

steps.title: Apply the fix for Metrics API Scaler support different format
steps.description:
_Provide a description of what has been changed_
```yaml
triggers:
- type: metrics-api
  metadata:
    targetValue: "8"
    url: "http://api:3232/api/v1/stats?format=prometheus"
    valueLocation: "go_memstats_mcache_inuse_bytes"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Metrics API Scaler support different format" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/kedacore/keda/pull/5347
codeSnippets:
triggers:
- type: metrics-api
  metadata:
    targetValue: "8"
    url: "http://api:3232/api/v1/stats?format=prometheus"
    valueLocation: "go_memstats_mcache_inuse_bytes"

triggers:
    - type: metrics-api
      metadata:
        url: http://keda-metric-app-svc.default.svc.cluster.local/prom-metric
        targetValue: "30"  # Threshold for scaling
        format: prometheus # picked this value from the PR (enum)
        promMetricLocation: "metric" # name of the metrics e.g. rpc_duration_seconds{quantile="0.99"} including the dimension
        promMetricType: "summary" # possible values counter, summary, histogram, gauge. I am thinking this will probably help in parsing the value, may keep as optional

triggers:
    - type: metrics-api
      metadata:
        url: http://keda-metric-app-svc.default.svc.cluster.local/prom-metric
        targetValue: "30"  # Threshold for scaling
        format: prometheus # picked this value from the PR (enum)
        valueLocation: "rpc_duration_seconds{quantile="0.99"}" # name of the metrics

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with keda installed or the issue environment reproducible.
